surfaces.label: Controlled source context
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
Controlled evidence reference: SYN-TRUNC-TITLE-01
Controlled synthetic technical control — independent expected-truth source (test-harness design, not the probe's own rendered output).
Probe design: Controlled truncated excerpt used as an evidence title
Controlled input construction: Test harness supplies a title string ending mid-sentence with an ellipsis, independent of any real client bundle.
Expected behaviour under test: Title must be withheld from solicitor display, not shown mid-word or mid-quote.

surfaces.label: Evidence title
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText: Evidence title withheld — incomplete quotation or truncated excerpt cannot be shown as a title. Check the source papers.
